term: paṭhaviṃ paṭhavito abhiññāya paṭhaviṃ na maññati
preferred_translation: having directly known earth as earth, one does not take oneself to be earth
alternative_translations: having directly known earth as earth, one does not conceive earth
discouraged_translations: having understood earth, one does not think earth
definition: MN 1 completed formula surface pairing direct knowing with the absence of selfing.
notes: Use this record for the arahant and Tathāgata side of the MN 1 pattern. The line preserves the same direct-knowing surface as the trainee formula, but here the non-selfing is stated as accomplished rather than instructed.

example_phrases.pali: paṭhaviṃ paṭhavito abhiññāya paṭhaviṃ na maññati
example_phrases.translation: having directly known earth as earth, one does not take oneself to be earth
example_phrases.notes: Control line for the completed arahant and Tathāgata pattern.

authority_basis.scope: Supports the accomplished non-selfing line for the arahant and the Tathāgata in the root-sequence pattern.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use this as the standard English control line for the completed MN 1 non-selfing pattern.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not flatten the line into generic understanding or thought language, and do not erase the achieved contrast with the prohibitive trainee formula.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the completed pattern from losing either the direct-knowing force or the explicit absence of selfing.
